texto: [H]er spare strange beauty was not that of a woman, nor even of a statue, but that of the Platonic absolute of which all beauty is but a shadow in a cave, cast by the Fire beyond fire.
explicacao: Citação de James Blish sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “[H]er spare strange beauty was not that of a woman, nor even of a statue, but that of the Platoni…” articula reflexao, beauty, spare em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: [A]ll knowledge goes through both stages, the annunciation out of noise into fact, and the disintegration back into noise again. The process involved was the making of increasingly finer distinctions. The outcome was an endless series of theoretical catastrophes.
explicacao: Citação de James Blish sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “[A]ll knowledge goes through both stages, the annunciation out of noise into fact, and the disint…” articula sabedoria, knowledge, science em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como termino e science.
